overview: An exclusive, visually stunning mobile-first party website for the '10s Only' event — a dark cinematic nightlife experience with Y2K nostalgia, neon aesthetics, and premium underground rave vibes. Features a FOMO-inducing hero, guest application system with photo uploads, admin approval dashboard, QR code tickets, and a locked interactive portal for approved guests including a personality quiz, confessions wall, and polaroid photo gallery.
features: Fullscreen cinematic hero with live countdown to May 23rd 2026
Guest application form with invite code validation and photo upload (3-5 photos)
Admin dashboard with approve/reject workflow and QR code generation
Approved guest portal with QR ticket display
Party personality quiz (locked to approved guests)
Anonymous confessions wall (locked to approved guests)
Polaroid-style photo gallery (locked to approved guests)
Dark Y2K neon aesthetic with glassmorphism, grain texture, and smooth animations
